module:
Unit tests for vector interface package independence.

These tests verify that the vector interface has proper fallback
mechanisms and can operate independently of other subsystems.

test_vector_dimensions_fallback.docstring: Test all fallback layers for vector dimensions.

test_module_import_independence.docstring: Test importing vector modules without app dependencies.

test_connection_config_independence.docstring: Test that connection configurations can work without Django settings.

test_backend_creation_independence.docstring: Test that backends can be created without Django dependencies.

test_service_initialization_independence.docstring: Test that the vector service can initialize without dependencies.

test_field_independence.docstring: Test that vector fields can work without database connections.

test_cross_subsystem_independence.docstring: Test that vector code doesn't pull in other semantic subsystems.

test_utils_module_independence.docstring: Test that the utils module can be used independently of Django.
